nodes.description: Prime 1 Studio is proud to present what could be the best addition to the Ultimate Premium Masterline Series: the 1:4 Scale UPMBR-04BN: Guts Berserker Armor Bloody Nightmare Version from Berserk!   Prime 1 Studio updates the highly popular Guts Berserker Armor statue with a glorious version! Having dispatched demon after demon, monster after monster, Guts surveys the results of his efforts bathed in the blood of his enemies.   With his Dragonslayer sword over his shoulder, this Guts statue comes in at an eye-opening 37 inches tall! Already a fan-favorite piece, this statue has been imbued with even more storytelling by showering Guts' Berserker Armor with a torrent of blood. When you think about it, it makes perfect sense with Guts' no-holds-barred fighting style.   The application of blood effects on any statue is a tricky venture, with a piece often ringing untrue and cartoony when done with substandard artistry and effort. But such is not the case with the Bloody Nightmare Version...Prime 1 Studio's team of expert painters studied the behavior of blood to be able to render it in perfect realism. The near-perfect application of blood effects accentuates the intricate detailing of the Berserker Armor: pooling in some areas and spattering realistically in others.   The Bloody Nightmare Version statue comes with two (2) swappable heads and two (2) pairs of swappable arms. Guts crouches down on a bloody hellscape of monsters and mayhem, pulled straight out of the world of Berserk!   For the multitude of Berserk fans, and especially those who have never bought a Guts statue...this is the one to buy!
nodes.name: Guts Berserker Armor (Bloody Nightmare Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are proud to present the Doze (Ver. 2) Statue. This resin figure is beautifully crafted and stands 16.2 inches tall. It features glow-in-the-dark features to make it stand out and catch the eye at any time of day.  A joint collaboration between MANAS S+U+M and sculptor Yuuki Morita (who has worked with creative studios such as AMD, Legendary Pictures and GAMEFREAK) the Doze Statue is a striking and beautifully surreal limited-edition collector's item that would be a great addition, or a great start, to any art collection.
nodes.name: Doze (Ver. 2)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Art Brand Studios are excited to present The Lion King Stained Glass Framed Art!  Let the light shine! Framed glass art hangings show their true colors when backlit with natural sunlight. Framed glass art hangings show their true colors when backlit with natural sunlight. Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: The Lion King

nodes.description: The power is different. I like it.   Electro is back, and he's stronger than ever. Jamie Foxx returns as classic Spidey villain Electro, last seen in The Amazing Spider-Man 2, opposite the web-slinger played by Andrew Garfield. In Spider-Man: No Way Home, Tom Holland's Peter Parker accidentally cracks open the Multiverse via a Doctor Strange-spell gone horribly wrong and finds himself face to face with this new foe, Electro.   Adding variety to your Spider-Man: No Way Home collection, Hot Toys is thrilled to present the power boosted Electro as Sixth Scale collectible figure inspired by his new look.  Meticulously crafted based on Electro's appearance in the movie, the movie-accurate Marvel figure features a newly developed head sculpt of Max Dillon a.k.a. Electro with stunning likeness; a detail recreation of his practical outfit with real-like cables; lightning effect accessories including a star-shaped mask inspired by his original design from comic pages; and a figure stand.  Collect the brand new Electro figure for your Spider-Man collectibles display!
nodes.name: Electro

nodes.description: A dangerous Lilith was born from Morrigan's soul and based on a new drawing by Shunya Yamashita!  The Lilith statue shows Lilith's slender, youthful body line, and adorable, innocent expression, but also gives glimpses of her ruthlessness and bewitchment. Could they be signs of her being a former succubus!?  Her underarms and ribs that are highlighted by curving her upper body and the mesmerizing, delicate movements of her shoulder blades have been sculpted by TSUBAME.  The sinister wings are sculpted to give a different impression when viewed from the front or back, and follow the same specifications as those of Morrigan! Along with Lilith's surreptitious cruelty, it expresses her lineage as the other self of that soul.  The Darkstalkers figure base resembles a stage from the video games and its color is matched that of Morrigan's. Display these two characters together that are bonded by an inseparable relationship!
nodes.name: Darkstalkers Lilith Bishoujo

nodes.description: We've done this dance for a long time. Too long. Aren't you at all curious?   Sideshow presents the Batman and Catwoman Diorama, a dynamic DC Comics collectible celebrating one of the most iconic couples in Detective Comics history.   Measuring 20 tall and 9.25 wide, this fully sculpted polystone DC statue depicts a Gotham City rooftop rendezvous with all the sensuality and playfulness that surrounds the relationship between the Dark Knight and his darling companion. Catwoman situates herself in front of her beau, mask off, and sultry smirk on. She's clad in a black catsuit as she slings her signature bullwhip across Batman's shoulders, back arched and eyes on the prize while she draws the Caped Crusader closer.  Stoic as ever, Batman looks away from Selina Kyle, although he can't resist a soft touch at her waist. His black cape sweeps down and around them, shrouding the couple in their intimate nighttime embrace. They both stand upon a warm church, with the orange glow of its directional paint lighting fanning the flames of their evening encounter.  Honor their romantic legacy when you bring home the Batman and Catwoman Diorama today!
nodes.name: Batman and Catwoman

nodes.description: 'Am I the next Hawkeye!?' The young bowmaster, Kate Bishop, makes her debut.  Continuing from the previous release, the latest addition to the MARVEL BISHOUJO series features a character from the new generation of heroines.  The increasingly popular Kate Bishop AKA Hawkeye, who appears in everything from the comics to the games, is the newest member of the lineup.  Her costume that appeared in the history-making must-read comic series Hawkeye: My Life as a Weapon, was given life by David Aja and Matt Hollingsworth. Its design is based on 1960s culture and has become Kate's main costume and the most recognizable among fans since its debut in 2012.  Based on this costume, the artwork by Shunya Yamashita is perhaps the most anime-like approach in the whole Bishoujo series. The playful expression of Lucky the Pizza Dog charging towards us, running free, and the flustered expression and pose of Kate as she is dragged along behind him, are captured in this lively comical moment.   The sculpt by Takaboku Busujima (BUSUJIMAX) combined with Kotobukiya's unique flavor results in a re-interpretation of this Marvel character never seen before.  Add Kate Bishop, a leader driving the new generation of Super Heroes, to your Marvel collection today!
nodes.name: Hawkeye (Kate Bishop) Bishoujo

nodes.description: 'Jack in!! MegaMan.EXE, transmit!'  MEGA MAN BATTLE NETWORK earned its popularity with its new world and unique game system, which set it apart from past MEGA MAN series and continues to have passionate fans today. From MEGA MAN BATTLE NETWORK, MEGA MAN, the protagonist and Lan Hikari's NetNavi, joins Kotobukiya's plastic model kit lineup!  This model fully utilizes the technology cultivated in the existing MEGA MAN X plastic model series to create intricate individual parts. The employment of CAD engineering allows the character's proportions to be faithfully recreated while also maintaining an impressive range of articulation. Mega Man can be recreated as if he stepped out of the game or anime just by assembling the model!  The extensive range of included items, such as the four different face parts that express his character, familiar attachments like the Buster, Cannon, and Sword, and impressive Life Sword effect parts will bring various famous scenes from the anime and game to life in the user's hands!
nodes.name: Mega Man (Mega Man Battle Network)

nodes.description: MEGA MAN BATTLE NETWORK earned its popularity with its new world and unique game system, which set it apart from past MEGA MAN series and continues to have passionate fans today. From MEGA MAN BATTLE NETWORK, DARK MEGA MAN, awakened by dark power, joins Kotobukiya's plastic model kit lineup!  This model fully utilizes the technology cultivated in the existing MEGA MAN X plastic model series to create intricate individual parts. The employment of CAD engineering allows the character's proportions to be faithfully recreated while also maintaining an impressive range of articulation. Dark Mega Man can be recreated as if he stepped out of the game or anime just by assembling the model!  The extensive range of included items, such as the four different face parts that express his character and familiar attachments like the Buster, Cannon, and Sword will bring various famous scenes from the anime and game to life in the user's hands!  As a bonus, Dark Mega Man comes with the enemy character Metall from the series, redesigned in the MEGA MAN BATTLE NETWORK style!
nodes.name: Dark Mega Man

nodes.description: Lost in the stars and amidst stretches of endless blackness, he saw only the vastness of non-existence. Floating among gods that populate the expanse as sparkling spots, forming something so beautiful, he feels good being one with the constellations.  Running along Draco's back, he finds courage from the mighty dragon that guarded the gardens of the Hesperides. Maybe it was the power of the 17 stars that form the fearsome constellation or Ladon's grit pushing him; through the mighty Draco, the Lost Space Boy perseveres in the vastness of non-existence.  At 6 tall and 9 long, Lost Space Boy: Drace by Kerby Rosanes is made from polystone. The Draco constellation is engraved along the translucent body, paying homage to the group of stars that inspired this piece.
nodes.name: Lost Space Boy: Draco

nodes.description: A coming together of three of Disney's most cherished characters! The short-tempered Donald Duck meets his match with the mischievous Chip 'n'Dale duo! What kind of crazy fun will these three have together?  Beast Kingdom proudly presents the latest Master Craft release of the very finest statues for the serious collector. The Donald Duck Special Edition Statue is a special, high-end edition of Donald Ducks release, which now includes two fun and crazy little chipmunk brothers Chip 'n'Dale! Presented in a luxurious, hand-painted two-tone metal and bronze colors, the statue sees the silver-painted Donald wearing his signature sailor costume in the midst of losing his temper. The chipmunk duo however are painted in bronze and look as though they have been rather naughty as they run away from Donald! Both are able to be placed anywhere around the statue, creating any scene that fans would like.   Limited to only 999 pieces, this statue is perfect for the high-end collector and is one not to be missed!
nodes.name: Donald Duck Special Edition

nodes.description: Beast Kingdom's 'Entertainment Experience Brand' takes fans back down the rabbit hole, with the launch of the latest in high-end Disney collectibles; The Master Craft Alice In Wonderland, Special Edition.  Revisit the peculiar yet extraordinary tale of a young girl named Alice, whom whilst reading peacefully under a tree, stumbles upon a rabbit hole, which leads to a dreamlike wonderland unlike any other! This sets in motion a series of fantastical stories that have brought joy and spectacle to generation after generation!  The Master Craft series continues the beauty of highly detailed, hand-crafted masterpieces, which brings to life some of the most cherished memories in pop culture history. This hand-crafted, professionally painted statue recreates Alice leisurely sitting on top of an oversized purple mushroom and drinking her afternoon tea! Included in the set are the 'Drink Me' potion, and 'Eat Me' biscuit, which can be freely positioned around the Alice in Wonderland figure.   This special edition release also uses the Italian 'Giorgio Morandi' paint style, which is notable for subtilty and beautiful simplicity. A starry sky, with gradient blue and purples are used to make Alice's clothing as well as the huge mushroom platform. A high-end take on the Alice Master Craft, only available in limited quantities and a must have release for fans of Alice in Wonderland and the works of the famous Italian painter.   The Alice in Wonderland Master Craft Alice Special Edition is limited to only 1951 pieces worldwide.
nodes.name: Alice in Wonderland Special Edition

nodes.description: Dark Horse Direct is proud to present an exclusive Masters of The Universe limited edition Fine Art Print!  This variant comic cover by Stjepan Sejic for the Masters of the Universe: Revelation #1 comic written by Kevin Smith, Rob David, and Tim Sheridan (the official prequel to the hit Netflix show!) is sure to thrill even the biggest MOTU fans!  Printed as an 11 x 17 lithograph on archival paper, this limited-edition item is never to be reproduced, making it a true collector's piece.  By the Power of Grayskull, your love of Eternia will be reignited with this one-of-a-kind, collectible, lithograph print!
nodes.name: Masters of the Universe: Revelation #1 Comic Cover

nodes.description: Sideshow and New Wave Toys are proud to present the M90 Mini Blaster, a miniaturized replica approximately 60% smaller and lighter than the original King of Boomboxes released in 1981!   The M90 Mini Blaster is designed to be played loud, featuring two 3 mid-range speakers that deliver a total of 30 watts of Big Power. The M90 mini Blaster is constructed from high-quality materials and is packed with features including independent bass and treble tone controls, a classic FM tuner, and comes complete with a replica wired remote control. A state-of-the-art rechargeable battery provides up to 40 hours of battery life with enough power to charge most USB-compatible devices.  Big Power is a collection of faithfully recreated iconic 1980's boomboxes at a fraction of the size and cost of original vintage boomboxes. Big Power blasters merge legendary boombox design with modern technology and are packed with traditional and contemporary features and accessories.   The M90 Mini Blaster comes with one Mini Wired Remote, four XL Tuning Knobs, one Mini Cassette & Jewel Case Props, one USB-C Charge Cable, one Replica Service Manual, and one Replica M90 Box.  Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: M90 Mini Blaster x Big Power

nodes.description: Sideshow and New Wave Toys are proud to present the M90 Micro Blaster, an accurately reproduced 1:6 scale replica of the 'King of Boomboxes' that fits perfectly with the RepliCade line of miniaturized arcade machines. Designed to fill your personal space with full and balanced sound at lower volumes without disturbing your neighbors.  This fully functional Bluetooth speaker features telescoping antennas, an articulated handle, a volume control dial, and enough power for up to 20 hours of playtime.   Big Power is a collection of faithfully recreated iconic 1980's boomboxes at a fraction of the size and cost of original vintage boomboxes. Big Power blasters merge legendary boombox design with modern technology and are packed with traditional and contemporary features and accessories.   Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: M90 Micro Blaster x Big Power

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present the Black Legion Helbrute Collectible Figure! Hailing from the dark sci-fi/fantasy universe of Warhammer 40,000, the Helbrute represents the darkest perversion of the Space Marine Dreadnought! Every Helbrute, like a Dreadnought is piloted by a living being. Helbrutes, however, are piloted by Chaos Space Marines who have been driven to the edge of madness. They are implanted into the machine, linking their nervous systems and becoming a single destructive war machine!  This figure stands at an impressive 9.13 inches tall, and features all the terrifying and awe-inspiring aspects of the Black Legion any fan of Warhammer would know to expect, from the dark armor to elements of the post-Heresey iconography with arrows surrounding eyes, around its heart, jagged fangs around the gun barrels and heart, and a massive hammer, used to commit any act, no matter how vile to appease their god.  No Chaos Space Marine army is complete without a dreadnought- and what better dreadnought is there than one driven by madness incarnate? Add the Black Legion Helbrute Collectible Figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Black Legion Helbrute

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present the New Zeus Mecha Heavy Firepower Model Collectible Figure. This figure features a 1:18 scale mecha and pilot combo, perfect for simple posing or enacting scenes of gripping battle! The collectible figure features a number of weapons for the mecha, including a scoped rifle and chainsaw swords both of which can be hed or mounted onto the back of the frame, making this New Zeus Mecha a veritable one machine army whether it chooses to engage from up close or at range! The mecha also features shoulder-mounted firepower in both rifle and rotary-machine gun forms. This mecha definitely lives up to its namesake in bringing the thunder!  The pilot is no slouch either, coming with holdable weapon options for him as well, including both a rifle and pistol options!  JoyToy's original series Battle for the Stars is a line of 1:18 scale, science fiction-themed action figures, and vehicles. The figures are made with exquisite detail and are highly posable to create a variety of scenes.  Add this piece to your army today!
nodes.name: New Zeus Mecha Heavy Firepower Model

nodes.description: The conflicted Hobbit, Gollum, is the eighth character to feature in our THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ Classic Coin Collection.   This 1oz silver coin shows him in full color, while frosting and a mirror finish for the background add depth to this coin's design.   Both coins arrive in a display-ready, quality coin case which is placed inside a matching box. A Certificate of Authenticity is provided, showing the coin's unique number in the limited mintage – 3,000! The legal tender status of the coin is confirmed by Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II effigy on the obverse side.   This is a treasured collectible for any fan, a reminder of the extraordinary characters created in THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ trilogy.   Grab this precious collectible today!
nodes.name: Gollum 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Batgirl (The New Batman Adventures) 100% & 400% Set. These Be@rbricks features Barbara Gordon AKA Babs AKA Batgirl!  The New Batman Adventures (or TNBA for short) was an animated television series that aired from 1997 to 1999. It was created as a sequel series to Batman: The Animated Series and follows the same storyline and continuity. Despite it's relatively short time on the air, TNBA stood out as both a fantastic cartoon and welcome addition to the Gotham world, earning two Daytime Emmies, among other awards!  Batgirl is depicted on this Be@rbrick, adapting her appearance and art from TNBA to the iconic Be@rbrick shape, creating a unique collectible like no other.  The 400% collectible figure stands over 11 inches tall, with the 100% standing approximately 2.75 inches tall.  Add these figures to your collection today!
nodes.name: Be@rbrick Batgirl (The New Batman Adventures) 100% & 400%

nodes.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Stay Puft Marshmallow Man (Costume Version) 400%. This Be@rbrick features the iconic Be@rbrick shape but with a special twist- there's a costume!  The Stay Puft Marshmallow Man made his debut in the 1984 film Ghostbusters and has since become a historic and memorable character, not just for the Ghostbusters series of films but for movies. The Stay Puft Marshmallow man has become synonymous with the Ghostbusters-style of 80's comedy, representing how sometimes even innocent things, under the right circumstances, can be terrifying!  This collectible figure stands over 11 inches tall.  Add to your collection today!
nodes.name: Be@rbrick Stay Puft Marshmallow Man (Costume Version) 400%

nodes.description: Our range of Chibi® Coins continues with this first character from Mortal Kombat – the deadly resurrected ninja, Scorpion.  The pure silver coin has been shaped and colored to resemble the early version of Scorpion. As a Chibi art version, the focus is on his distinctive yellow tunic and mask, with contrasting black headgear. The Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the opposite side to confirm it as a legal tender coin.   The Mortal Kombat-themed box comes with a large window that allows you to easily display this hot collectible. The coin's unique serial number and a Certificate of Authenticity are both displayed on the box too.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, there are only 2,000 coins being minted - so you will feel like a winner if you get one.   Get over here - now!
nodes.name: Scorpion 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: ROBO-DOU Tekkaman (Threezero Redesign) is a collectible figure inspired by Tekkaman, The Space Knight , an anime made by Tatsunoko Productions and aired in 1975. Retaining its essential factors from the original design, such as the basic silhouette and coloring, Threezero has added exquisite mechanical details to reinterpret Tekkaman in a modernized style.  ROBO-DOU Tekkaman (Threezero Redesign) is a non-scale articulated figure approximately 7.8 tall. It utilizes a die-cast frame that provides over 50 points of articulation and is constructed of ABS, PVC, POM, and zinc alloy, providing an armored consistency as well as a foundation for maintaining balance. LED light-up features are installed in the Voltekka shooting port at the forehead and also at the eyes.   For the weapons, the figure comes with a double-ended lance 'Tekklancer' and a whip 'Tekkwin.' The whip end of Tekkwin has metal wire inside which makes it bendable and poseable. Other accessories include three pairs of interchangeable hands (one pair of fists, one pair of weapon-holding hands, and one pair of opened hands), which all makes it possible to display the figure in the heroic poses seen in the anime.   Don't miss your chance to add this Tekkaman collectible figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: ROBO-DOU Tekkaman (Threezero Redesign)

nodes.description: It's that round-headed kid, Charlie Brown, in his red shirt as seen in Charles Schulz's Vintage Era Peanuts comic strips! Bring the original anti-hero home with this 16' Supersize Charlie Brown premium vinyl figure featuring real soft goods clothing, including his red polo shirt with its signature black zig-zag and black shorts. Poseable with five points of articulation, Supersize Charlie Brown comes packaged in a collector-friendly box featuring the original Peanuts comic strips that inspired this design. An excellent companion for your vintage-style Supersize Snoopy figure!
nodes.name: Charlie Brown (Red Shirt)

nodes.description: The Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures of Ren Hoek and Stimpson J. Cat are once again available! Bask in the glory of their detailed sculpting, interchangeable heads & hands, and awesome accessories, and weep no more. Bring some Happy, Happy, Joy, Joy into your life and secure these made-to-order 7 scale Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures- don't be an EEDIOT and miss out on them!  He's as simple as a single-color Rubik's Cube, but behind his dopey feline exterior, Stimpy is a naïve soul with a heart of some precious metal. Not gold, of course. Maybe palladium or iridium... no, not that. Ah! We've got it: Rhenium! Yep, that seems right. A heart of rhenium! Yes, it is SO a thing, just look it up, you troglodyte! Sheesh! This 7 scale highly articulated Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure of Stimpson J. Cat features premium sculpting and decoration, interchangeable heads & hands, as well as a number of detailed accessories. We know that owning this made-to-order Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure may not be for everyone, because most people are super-lame, but not YOU! You are one of the special ones who knows that if you don't have the Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures in your collection, you might as well not have a collection at all!
nodes.name: Stimpy

Bask in the glory of their detailed sculpting, interchangeable heads & hands, and awesome accessories, and weep no more. Bring some Happy, Happy, Joy, Joy into your life and secure these made-to-order 7 scale Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures- don't be an EEDIOT and miss out on them!  Who doesn't love the violently psychotic Chihuahua that is Ren Hoek? Fun fact: he doesn't shake because he's scared or cold- he shakes because he's barely able to control his inexhaustible rage, YOU EEDIOT! This 7 scale highly articulated Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure of Ren Hoek features premium sculpting and decoration, interchangeable heads & hands, as well as a number of detailed accessories. We know that owning this made-to-order Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure may not be for everyone, because most people are super-lame, but not YOU! You are one of the special ones who knows that if you don't have the Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures in your collection, you might as well not have a collection at all!
nodes.name: Ren

nodes.description: This is the moment that defines Krypton's legacy for all time.   Sideshow Art Prints and Alex Ross Art present the Last Son of Krypton Fine Art Lithograph, a stunning Superman art print depicting the iconic hero's humble origins.  The fight for truth, justice, and a better tomorrow started with Kal-El's past. Legendary comics artist Alex Ross captures his fateful escape from the doomed planet of Krypton, hurtling towards Earth in an escape rocket. From there, the Kryptonian infant was welcomed by a humble Kansas family, taking on the identity of Clark Kent until the world needed Kal-El to become Superman. Donning the blue, red, and yellow suit, he now stands strong as a beacon of hope for all those across the Omniverse in need of a champion.  Each Last Son of Krypton Fine Art Lithograph is hand-signed by Alex Ross and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 200 pieces. This dynamic DC Comics wall art is an essential addition to any fan's own Hall of Justice.  Welcome Superman to Earth and to your collection with the Last Son of Krypton Fine Art Lithograph by Alex Ross today.
nodes.name: Last Son of Krypton

nodes.description: Sideshow and Eaglemoss are excited to present the USS Liu Cixin Ship Model!  Named after the acclaimed 21st-century Chinese science-fiction writer, the dynamic U.S.S. Liu Cixin starship performed a scout role for the Federation. Other vessels of a similar class during this era included the U.S.S. Le Guin- named after Ursual K. Le Guin, an Earth writer of speculative fiction. The U.S.S. Le Guin was commanded by Captain Bandra.  Don't miss your chance to add this ship model to your collection today!
nodes.name: USS Liu Cixin Ship

nodes.description: Show your allegiance to the Monsters of Rock with this electrifying and officially licensed Iron Maiden Book of Souls Tankard!  The zombie-like music icon emerges from the front and back of the tankard, staring forward with this piercing red eyes and intimidating all those that pass by. Surrounded by tribal symbols and skulls inspired by the artwork featured within the band's Book of Souls album.  Cast in high-quality resin and hand-painted, the tankard comes with removable stainless steel insert so you can spend less time cleaning and more time rocking!
nodes.name: Book of Souls Tankard

nodes.description: Wow. Very ukiyo. Much picture.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Doge Canvas Art Print by artist ukiyomemes, blending Japanese art history with modern meme culture to create a high-end and iconic addition to any art collection.  Ukiyo-e, or pictures of the floating world, is a Japanese art movement from the 17th century that emphasizes beauty and pleasure in life through a variety of subjects from history and folk tales. The style became popular with merchants prosperous enough to indulge in the privilege of decorating their homes with artwork — and now you can do the same, with a modern twist!  Artist ukiyomemes blends the classic art sensibilities with the most popular visual language of the current moment, internet memes. In the Doge Canvas Art Print, a mischievous Shiba Inu sits in a patch of pink flowers, surrounded by its enigmatic inner monologue. Captions above its head translate to, Wow. Very ukiyo. Much picture. Would lick. Shibe art is the most powerful. Can't keep my eyes off. Begonias symbolize dark thoughts, beware, and grrrr. Such wisdom from the curious doge.  Each Doge Fine Art Print is officially licensed by Memes of the Floating World, AKA ukiyomemes, and comes printed on Aurora Natural Canvas, adding depth and texture to the image. The gallery wrapped canvas print also features sawtooth hanging hardware already installed for ease of display, and archival inks ensure the longevity of this beautiful composition in your collection.  Such art. Do want. Elevate your humor to the floating world with the Doge Canvas Art Print by ukiyomemes today!
nodes.name: Doge

nodes.description: Of course I'm a threat. Why? Did you think for a moment that I wasn't?   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Emma Frost Fine Art Print, a dazzling original Marvel Comics art print by artist Serafleur.  As cold as ice and as brilliant as a finely cut gem, mutant Emma Frost is not one to be trifled with. In addition to her powerful wealth and family name, her telepathic abilities and organic diamond form make her a true force of influence and strength among the X-Men. Serafleur's signature sparkling style emphasizes Emma's flawless sense of fashion as she begins to transform before the viewer's eyes. Though she may have a cool demeanor, the White Queen can still rain hellfire down on anyone who tries to undermine her.  Each Emma Frost Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 375 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this radiant X-Men artwork brings a touch of mutant class to any fan's Marvel collection.  Consider this your personal invitation to the Hellfire Club — bring home the Emma Frost Fine Art Print by Serafleur today!
nodes.name: Emma Frost

nodes.description: Every day there's a new horror. A new test to this city's ruined soul. And yet, all too rarely … there is salvation.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Batman™: Streets of Gotham Fine Art Print, a moody and mysterious DC Comics art print by artist Dustin Nguyen.  Darkness envelops Gotham City — from the physical shadows to the symbolic corruption in the hearts of criminals. Only Batman can thrive in that darkness and still bring light to those living in distress. This foreboding portrait of Bruce Wayne's heroic alter ego captures that duality, with Nguyen's signature watercolor style emphasizing the danger and salvation that waits above the streets. As Batman observes from the lofty perch of a gargoyle, the Bat-Signal shines bright behind him, casting a light of warning, of promise, and of justice over the skyline clouded by fear.  Originally created as the cover to Batman: Streets of Gotham #1 (2009), written by Paul Dini for DC Comics, this comic book collectible is now available to fans in a fine art presentation. Each Batman: Streets of Gotham Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. DC Comics collectors won't want to miss a chance to add this Batman artwork to their walls!  Send up the signal and call down the Batman: Streets of Gotham Fine Art Print by Dustin Nguyen for your collection today.
nodes.name: Batman™: Streets of Gotham

nodes.description: I should dump him for good this time.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Distracted Boyfriend Canvas Art Print (Set of 2) by artist ukiyomemes, blending Japanese art history with modern meme culture to create a high-end and iconic addition to any art collection.  Ukiyo-e, or pictures of the floating world, is a Japanese art movement from the 17th century that emphasizes beauty and pleasure in life through a variety of subjects from history and folk tales. The style became popular with merchants prosperous enough to indulge in the privilege of decorating their homes with artwork — and now you can do the same, with a modern twist!  Artist ukiyomemes blends the classic art sensibilities with the most popular visual language of the current moment, internet memes. The Distracted Boyfriend Canvas Art Print (Set of 2) turns a pair of viral stock photos into a dramatic tale of disloyalty in the Edo period. On the left canvas, a woman wearing a red kimono fans herself while a caption above reads, A beauty is strolling among the shops unaware that she is being watched by a fool with bad intentions. On the right canvas, a man in a blue kimono remarks to himself, Hahaha, what a hottie. I always say, 'Just because you are on a diet doesn't mean you can't look at the menu.' Beside him, a woman in a blue kimono looks on in disgust, thinking, I can't believe it! He's up to his bad behavior again! I should dump him for good this time.   The Distracted Boyfriend Canvas Art Print Set is officially licensed by Memes of the Floating World, AKA ukiyomemes, and each individual image comes printed on Aurora Natural Canvas, adding depth and texture to the composition. The gallery wrapped canvas prints also feature sawtooth hanging hardware installed for ease of display, and archival inks ensure the longevity of this amusing scene in your collection.  Elevate your humor to the floating world and bring home the Distracted Boyfriend Canvas Art Print (Set of 2) today!
nodes.name: Distracted Boyfriend (Set of 2)

nodes.description: Is this a pigeon?   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Confused Anime Butterfly Guy Canvas Art Print (Set of 2) by artist ukiyomemes, blending Japanese art history with modern meme culture to create a high-end and humorous addition to any art collection.  Ukiyo-e, or pictures of the floating world, is a Japanese art movement from the 17th century that emphasizes beauty and pleasure in life through a variety of subjects from history and folk tales. The style became popular with merchants prosperous enough to indulge in the privilege of decorating their homes with artwork — and now you can do the same, with a modern twist!   Artist ukiyomemes blends the classic art sensibilities with the most popular visual language of the current moment, internet memes. The Confused Anime Butterfly Guy Canvas Art Print (Set of 2) captures a ridiculous moment of misunderstanding in the natural world. The caption above the curious man reads, Kore wa hato desu ka, which translates to, Is this a pigeon? as he gestures to the beautiful creature before him. The image with the butterfly reads, Kore wa sumire desu ka, which translates to, Are these violets? further referencing the anime from which the meme originates.  The Confused Anime Butterfly Guy Canvas Art Print Set is officially licensed by Memes of the Floating World, AKA ukiyomemes, and each individual image comes printed on Aurora Natural Canvas, adding depth and texture to the composition. The gallery wrapped canvas prints also feature sawtooth hanging hardware installed for ease of display, and archival inks ensure the longevity of this hilarious scene in your collection.  Is this your next purchase? Elevate your humor to the floating world and bring home the Confused Anime Butterfly Guy Canvas Art Print (Set of 2) today!
nodes.name: Confused Anime Butterfly Guy (Set of 2)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Eaglemoss are excited to present the UN One Ship Model!  The Expanse's UN One was a unique, short-range shuttlecraft used by the Secretary-General of the United Nations. The shuttle featured a lavish cabin and could be stowed within the hangar bay of a Leonidas-class battleship. UN One was capable of atmospheric flight, and vertical take-off and landing. Its wings could be folded, allowing it to be stored in the hanger of larger, interplanetary vessels, such as the Leonidas-class, for transportation to other planets.  Don't miss your chance to add this ship model to your collection today!
nodes.name: UN One Ship

nodes.description: 'I'm Vengeance. – The Batman  Debuted quickly after this year's mind-blowing DC Fandome trailer, comes this exciting release for Prime 1 Studio. We are incredibly proud to present the unbelievable 1:3 Scale THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Limited Version Statue from THE BATMAN!  At almost 35 inches tall, Prime 1 Studio's 1:3 Scale Museum Masterline THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Limited Version Statue is based on Jim Lee's breathtaking DC Fandome illustration from 2020's DC Fandome Event. Prime 1 Studio created this work of art to take advantage of every opportunity to showcase this newest Batman and to shine a spotlight on how awesome this new design aesthetic is.  Prime 1 Studio's artist team took the kernel of Jim Lee's artwork and embellished it to push the realism and drama. Inspired by the film, our artists have pushed the boundaries of what's possible to bring you an exciting take on the Caped Crusader.  This Limited Version comes with more surprises for your displaying pleasure! More than one portrait, the Limited Version will come with three (3) unique, swappable portraits in total. While one is directly inspired by Jim Lee's art, one portrait is an homage to the upcoming film and the other portrait will be a callback to a more comic-based appearance. Moreover, it comes with two (2) swappable Left Hands and three (3) Swappable Right Hands to allow you to extend your storytelling! Also possesses an added element of drama: Our skillful Prime 1 Studio tailors have equipped this fearsome statue with an equally emotive, poseable Fabric Cape! Adjust the posing of this Fabric Cape to bring out the most expressive pose yet!  Perched atop an iconic gargoyle, THE BATMAN is ready to take on Gotham City's most superstitious, and cowardly lot. And the best news? THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Limited Version Statue is also ready to occupy your very own shelf! Add him to your DC Comics collection today!
nodes.name: The Batman Special Art Edition (Limited Version)

nodes.description: 'I'm Vengeance. – The Batman  Debuted quickly after this year's mind-blowing DC Fandome trailer, comes this exciting release for Prime 1 Studio. We are incredibly proud to present the unbelievable 1:3 Scale THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Deluxe Version Statue from THE BATMAN!  At almost 35 inches tall, Prime 1 Studio's 1:3 Scale Museum Masterline THE BATMAN Special Art Edition Statue is based on Jim Lee's breathtaking DC Fandome illustration from 2020's DC Fandome Event. Prime 1 Studio created this work of art to take advantage of every opportunity to showcase this newest Batman and to shine a spotlight on how awesome this new design aesthetic is.  Prime 1 Studio's artist team took the kernel of Jim Lee's artwork and embellished it to push the realism and drama. Inspired by the film, our artists have pushed the boundaries of what's possible to bring you an exciting take on the Caped Crusader.  You can easily see from his head alone, the leather-like texture and intricate stitching on his cowl, and subtle facial features in the lower half of his face...these have been executed to perfection. His armor is both solid form and brutal function rolled into one. It gives him a menacing silhouette, and also the protection he needs to do his job effectively. You can see every stitch, every dent, every texture, every pouch, and every strap as if it were the real thing.  While he looks like a night creature devoid of color, our painters took great care in differentiating the multitude of armor pieces, cloth textures, and other aspects of the suit to portray that his costume is made up of numerous parts...and not just a solid block of darkness. We have employed many different finishes and painting techniques to bring out the stark realism of this piece. We wanted to showcase how Jim Lee's drawing could inspire realism in a statue.  This Deluxe Version comes with more surprises for your displaying pleasure! More than one portrait, the Deluxe Version will come with three (
nodes.name: The Batman Special Art Edition (Deluxe Version)

As a bonus, the set includes option parts for the Ultraman the Animation figure (sold separately).[Set Contents]Main Body, Three left and four right optional hands, Optional Color Timer, Flame effect parts, Ultra Badge[Bonus Part]ULTRAMAN -the Animation- Ultra Slash effect parts(L/R), One set of optional hands for ULTRAMAN -the Animation

nodes.description: Sideshow and Taka Corp Studio are proud to present the Toothless & Hiccup Statue!  This beautiful sixth-scale statue shows Toothless and his rider Hiccup in a pose reminiscent of one of the How to Train Your Dragon 2 movie poster and home media covers. Hiccup is skillfully riding atop Toothless's back, gripping the fiery Dragon Sword, known as Inferno in one hand. Below, Toothless stands atop a base of fragmented crystal, in a battle-ready pose that conveys just how dangerous the dragon-rider combo can be.  This statue measures a whopping 30 inches wide (thanks to that impressive wingspan), and over 15 inches tall!  Every detail is excruciatingly rendered, from the texture of Toothless's hide to the detailing on Hiccup's equipment. Hiccup comes with an alternative portrait to be portrayed with or without his riding helmet.  Each statue is numbered and includes a certificate of authenticity.  Add to your DreamWorks Dragons collection today!
nodes.name: Toothless & Hiccup
