nodes.description: Shame on you, when you step through to the Ol' Dirty Bastard, Brooklyn Zoo!   Sideshow presents the Ol' Dirty Bastard Statue, an officially licensed collectible honoring the legacy of one of Brooklyn's finest — the American rapper ODB himself.  The Ol' Dirty Bastard Statue measures 13 tall and 11.5 wide, depicting the one-man army rising up triumphantly from the New York subway while the Brooklyn Bridge towers above him. A Brooklyn warrior MC and an icon of hip hop culture, he stomps down hard on the scene, ready to make his mark on the world.  The Ol' Dirty Bastard Statue is fully sculpted in a unique forced perspective style with dynamic paint application to give this tribute a larger-than-life presence on your shelf. ODB grips the warped bars of a Brooklyn Zoo cage as his boots crack the stone-like base below when he takes to the streets. The immersive scene features many textures and colors to capture the look of denim, brick, metal, and more in this detailed three-dimensional collectible. Ol' Dirty Bastard embodies swagger and attitude, with a snarl on his face as he takes his place in the spotlight of the music world.   Return to the 36 Chambers and bring home the Ol' Dirty Bastard Statue for your collection today!
nodes.name: Ol' Dirty Bastard

nodes.description: Today we reveal the first in a new Star Wars™ Battle Scenes collection, showcasing the Battle of Hoth™ from Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back™. To do justice to these coins we are using 3oz pure silver for a large 55mm diameter!  AT-AT Walkers, a Scout Walker, a Star Destroyer, and a Snowtrooper™ are shown in engraved relief with a frosted finish on this huge coin. These are complemented by a colored background landscape and a mirror finish sky. This coin really has it all!   The effigy of Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse and confirms the coin is legal tender. There is a mintage of just 1,000! With a Certificate of Authenticity and unique serial number provided on the compact, themed box this is the perfect package.   This coin for the ice planet Hoth would give any Star Wars™ fan the shivers!  Don't you lose out on this one!
nodes.name: Battle Scenes Hoth 3oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: When I put this suit on, I thought, this is it. This is the moment I become who I'm supposed to be. – Kate Bishop  Kate Bishop is now officially the new Hawkeye of the Marvel Cinematic Universe, with Clint Barton embracing her as his partner and protégé in the finale of Marvel Studios' Hawkeye series.  Demonstrating a high degree of screen accuracy, the Kate Bishop Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the Hawkeye collection is now ready to accept new challenges.  Crafted with exceptional workmanship, the sixth scale figure captured Hailee Steinfeld's appearance as Kate Bishop in Hawkeye features a newly developed head and hair sculpt, realistic wound make-up and bandage; finely tailored archer costume; wood grain patterned bow, also arrows and interchangeable trick heads, arrow quiver and a figure stand for display.  Team up with the young archer now! Pre-order this Kate Bishop figure for your Marvel collection.
nodes.name: Kate Bishop

nodes.description: Madness is an emergency exit. You can just step outside and close the door on all those dreadful things that happened.   Sideshow and Tweeterhead present The Joker 1:4 Maquette, a crazy charming Sideshow exclusive statue to add to your DC Comics collection.  The Joker 1:4 Maquette measures 20 wide and about 26 tall when fully assembled — from the bottom of the base to the tippy top of the Batman's cowl draped across the Clown Prince's chair. This fully sculpted polyresin statue comes crammed with a bunch of trophies and toys from The Joker's Gotham City escapades.  Armed with his gilded cane, a playing card, and bladed dress shoes, The Joker sits atop his personalized throne. He teeters precariously on a giant pile of spoils including money bags, gasoline tanks, bombs, and endless knick-knacks and knives. The maquette also includes an additional right hand holding a blade and an additional alternate style portrait, creating four total different ways you can display your newest Joker collectible. With so many Easter eggs and details, you'll always find something new to love in this villainous piece!  For a scene of absolute chaos, pair him with the lovely Harley Quinn 1:4 Maquette by Sideshow and Tweeterhead — sold separately.  Packed full of dastardly details and dreadful delights, this absolutely bonkers Joker 1:4 Maquette by Tweeterhead is surely gonna put a smile on your face! Add him to your DC Comics collection today, exclusively available through Sideshow.
nodes.name: The Joker

nodes.description: Sideshow and Bandai are proud to present the Boba Fett's Starship 1:144 Scale Model Kit!  The highly detailed model kit comes with a Cloud City style display base, laser blast effect parts, two figures of Boba Fett (sitting and standing), a Han Solo in carbonite, parts for displaying the craft with its hatch open, and wing flap parts. Features a movable cockpit and wings. This is a color-molded snap-fit model kit.  Be sure to add this Model Kit to your Star Wars collection!
nodes.name: Boba Fett’s Starship

nodes.description: I shall savor your destruction. I am your living hell! Call me Purgatori!   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Purgatori 1:3 Scale Statue, a devilish addition to any display of Dynamite collectibles.  This is one hell of a statue! Purgatori measures a showstopping 33.25 tall and 33.5 wide with her demonic wings outstretched over a graveyard scene. The vampire goddess sits on a headstone, holding the skeletal remains of some unfortunate sinner. Grave dirt, grass, and a rusted gate all contrast with Purgatori's fiery presence as the vengeful vixen hungrily searches for her next victim.  The Purgatori 1:3 Scale Statue is fully sculpted to capture all the seductive details of this iconic Dynamite character. Purgatori's crimson-skinned complexion is accented with black costume pieces with small gold elements, including her bikini top and bottom, a choker, long gloves, and thigh-high boots. Her red and black wings have veined details and large talons at each end, as a reminder of her deadliness. Purgatori's portrait features sculpted black hair, striking yellow eyes, pointed horns, and vampire fangs peeking out behind parted red lips. The statue includes two distinct sets of swappable bangs for her portrait, allowing you to change up her hairstyle. Glossy paint adds an extra dimension of vibrancy to the display and an ankh necklace representing her past life completes her signature look.  Pair Purgatori with the Lady Death 1:3 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio, sold separately, for an epic tribute to two horror icons in comics.  A little new blood never hurt anybody! Inject some life into your collection and order the Purgatori 1:3 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today.
nodes.name: Purgatori

nodes.description: From the 'ULTRAMAN' Season 2 anime, ULTRAMAN SUIT TARO is now available as a sixth scale articulated anime figure! Kotaro Higashi, a young journalist with strong sense of justice, has suddenly acquired a unique ability due to a mysterious incident, and happens to obtain a new ULTRAMAN SUIT still in development. Under the name of TARO, he enters battle against aliens attacking earth.   FigZero 1/6 ULTRAMAN SUIT TARO (Anime Version) stands approximately 12.2 tall, and is a fully-articulated figure with over 52 points of articulation. The Ultraman collectible figure has a detailed paint application and decals, and is constructed partially of die-cast zinc alloy and other metal parts. LED light-up features are installed at the eyes and the Color Timer on the chest.  TARO's iconic blazing fire effects come in multiple forms for this Ultraman collectible: 1 pair for chest, 1 pair for upper back, 1 pair for lower back, 1 pair for fists, and 1 piece in shooting form. Other accessories include the Ultra Badge which Kotaro uses in transforming into ULTRMAN SUIT TARO form, and multiple interchangeable hands: 1 pair of fists, 1 pair of knife-hands, 1 pair of fire shooting hands, and 1 right hand for holding the Ultra Badge.
nodes.name: Ultraman Suit Taro (Anime Version)

nodes.description: The fear of death is far greater than death itself. But the fear of the unknown is the greatest fear of all!   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Undertaker: The Modern Phenom 1:4 Scale Statue, takin' care of business with your WWE collectibles.  Standing 26 tall from the bottom of the base to the top of his hat, the Undertaker: Modern Phenom 1:4 Scale Statue brings an iconic eerie presence to any collection as a high-end tribute to this WWE superstar. Buried alive and back from the grave, the Deadman reaches his gloved hands out towards his next ill-fated opponent. The Undertaker: Modern Phenom stands on a black circular podium base measuring 10 wide, accented with his namesake logo in purple text.   The Undertaker: Modern Phenom Statue features a fully sculpted physique and costume recreating the celebrated wrestler's supernaturally unnerving presence in the ring. Inspired by a more contemporary era of WWE history, the Undertaker wears an all-black ensemble including a wide brim hat, a low-neck shirt, pants, boots, and his signature duster coat. His portrait has a piercing gaze and every inch of this incredible wrestling collectible is packed with realistic detailing, from the strands of his dark hair to the fabric-like textures and creases of the macabre outfit.  Toll the bell and summon the Undertaker: Modern Phenom 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio to your collection today.
nodes.name: Undertaker: The Modern Phenom

nodes.description: When Paul Phoenix, the golden boy of the martial arts world, steps into the ring, the excitement in the crowd is palpable. But this time when his opponent's name rang over the arena's loudspeakers, he could only scratch his head in disbelief. It was Kuma... again!  However, Kuma was nowhere to be seen. Word went around that the bear had dropped out of the tournament. The ring announcer informed the spectators of a last-minute change to the fight card. Relieved, Paul awaits the entrance of his long-anticipated human opponent...  Don't miss your chance to add this Paul Phoenix Action Figure to your video game collection today!
nodes.name: Paul Phoenix

nodes.description: Animegami Studios is proud to present their latest resin collectible, Tomie 1:6 Scale Resin Statue from the worldwide hit Junji Ito Collection in the Manga Version. This is their first release from this series of products.  The successful artist Mitsuo Mori whose work consists of portraits of young women, becomes obsessed with Tomie, trying over and over again to paint her. Eventually, Tomie becomes his model. While Tomie is sitting for her portrait she tells Mori that every man who has ever loved her tried to kill her, and she doesn't know why. Mori paints Tomie but does so with a hideous demonic face merged with her own. Tomie sneers at the painting causing Mori to go into a homicidal rage, chopping her into pieces.  The base of our piece reflects precisely that, the severed body parts after Mori's rage. Tomie is then reborn from the severed parts, with her pose and attire being a reference to the photo taken outside earlier in the episode. Included is a head variant showcasing her hideous demonic face.  A full-length episode can be streamed on our Licensor website Crunchyroll.
nodes.name: Tomie (Manga Version)

nodes.description: This grassy green buddy might be a little on the silent side, but when it comes to talking pop culture, he always puts things bluntly. Reframe your view with the flocked Kevin Smith: Guru Askew (Dope Variant) Designer Collectible Toy by artist CHOGRIN today.  Artist Statement: Growing up in the '90s I never thought that one day I'd be making a toy paying tribute to one of my creative heroes. Guru Askew is my tribute to Kevin Smith's universe and the many different entrepreneurial hats he has worn over the years. From filmmaking to writing comics to podcasting, Kevin's trailblazing has allowed and inspired indie filmmakers and artists to get high off their own supply as well. And so, I proudly present to you Kevin Smith: Guru Askew!   Artist Bio: Chogrin is an illustrator & storyteller from Guayaquil, Ecuador. His work is inspired by classic American and Japanese cartoons. For the last decade he's worked in the animation industry, as well as having a hand in the pop-culture art gallery scene, personally curating themed art shows around the world. He's currently developing his own animated short film Lucky Brave's Sunshine, among other original art projects.
nodes.name: Kevin Smith: Guru Askew (Dope Variant)

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present the Aggressor Brother Sergeant Lycias Action Figure, as part of the Imperial Fists series from the line of Warhammer 40K action figures!  The Imperial Fists are among the First Founding Chapters of the Space Marines and stand out among other Space Marines as they have no fixed homeworld. Instead, they rely upon their ancient mobile space fortress named Phalanx which serves as both fortress and monastery.  Aggressors are specialists within the Primaris Space Marines, and are tasked with close-range fire support. A Brother, or Battle-Brother, is the most common unit for a Space Marine to be assigned to after passing their trials, as well as being a general form of address Space Marines will use when addressing one another.
nodes.name: Aggressor Brother Sergeant Lycias

nodes.description: Sideshow and Super7 are Proud to present the Snoopy (Newsprint Greyscale) Vinyl Collectible!  If you grew up on Peanuts, here is the puppy you've always dreamed of! This poseable 12 tall Supersize Snoopy is made of premium vinyl and features soft felted ears and a real collar with metal tag. This grayscale newsprint variant is an homage to Charles Schulz's original 1950s comic strips! The Supersize Snoopy will arrive packaged in a pet carrier and includes an adoption certificate, straight from Daisy Hill Puppy Farm!
nodes.name: Snoopy (Newsprint Grayscale)

nodes.description: Sideshow, Threezero and Marvel Studios are excited to present the DLX Iron Man Mark 50 Collectible Figure as the next figure in the Marvel DLX series. It adopts the classic colors of red and gold and with the multi-layer coating process, and highly replicates the design of nanotechnology suit that appeared in Marvel Studios' Avengers: Infinity War.  This fully-articulated collectible figure stands approximately 6.9 (~17.5cm) tall and is constructed of Threezero's renowned DLX die-cast system with 48 points of articulation. Included with this product for the first time are the new nanotech melee weapons from the movie, the Nano-Katar and Energy Blade. Detailed structural engineering and exquisite design enable the figure to depict a variety of action poses while maintaining a realistic appearance.  LED lighting functions are located on the chest and the eyes, and the two flight panels on the back can flip to open and closed. Additional equipment and accessories include five pairs of interchangeable hands, effect parts for shooting and flight poses, and a DLX action stand; allowing for a wide variety of display possibilities!
nodes.name: DLX Iron Man Mark 50

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are excited to present the Daredevil Volume 1 #1 Pewter Collectible!  Although radioactive waste robs him of his sight in a freak accident, Matt Murdock soon realizes the same tragedy has heightened his remaining senses. Disguised by his public persona of a blind lawyer, Murdock fights crime as his alter ego Daredevil, a costumed hero possessed of remarkable skill enhanced by his extraordinary sensory abilities.  Alan Quah and Ghim Ong's exciting pewter Daredevil charges out of Jack Kirby and Bill Everett's 1964 cover art in his iconic first-appearance costume, signature billy club at the ready.  Alan Quah is a respected illustrator in the international comics and collectibles communities. Ghim Ong's strong interest in 3D sculpting has led to his working on Marvel, DC, and Disney properties.  Don't miss your chance to add this pewter collectible to your Marvel collection today!
nodes.name: Daredevil Volume 1 #1

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are excited to present the Wolverine The Incredible Hulk Volume 1 #181 Pewter Collectible!  The Wolverine debuts, leaping out of nowhere to gatecrash a confrontation between the Hulk and the cursed Wendigo. With the creature apparently dispatched by Adamantium claws through its throat, Wolverine resumes his brawl with the Green Goliath, setting in motion one of the comic world's most famous rivalries.  Considered by collectors amongst the most legendary of first-appearance comics, Alan Quah and Ghim Ong's pewter rendition of the world's first Canadian superhero explodes from Herb Trimpe, John Romita, and Gaspar Saladino's 1974 cover art in spectacular fashion.  Alan Quah is a respected illustrator in the international comics and collectibles communities. Ghim's strong interest in 3D sculpting has led to his working on Marvel, DC, and Disney properties.  Don't miss your chance to add this pewter collectible to your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: Wolverine The Incredible Hulk Volume 1 #181

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are excited to present the Boba Fett Bust in pewter, on a pedestal of composite resin.  The lack of a stormtrooper scowl or Vader grimace does little to quell the unease when facing Boba Fett. Devoid of any apparent expression, his inscrutable helmet underscores the cold-blooded efficiency with which the famed bounty hunter approaches his profession.  Every detail of Fett's armor is meticulously reproduced in this limited edition. Braided Wookiee scalps and battle suit quilting offset the engineered precision of the Duraplast armor and the helmet with its distinctive targeting rangefinder. The Mythosaur skull emblem, clan sigil, and signature dents complete the look.   Don't miss your chance to add this Boba Fett Bust to your Star Wars collection.
nodes.name: Boba Fett

nodes.description: From the exciting 2013 hit movie The Wolverine, where the character travels to Tokyo to fulfill a long-lost promise, comes the special EAA-094 X-Men Ronin Logan! With the included two face sculpts collectors are able to show off the mighty character in his different angry moods! A full Samurai outfit made of real fabric as well as a Samurai sword and a collection of replaceable hairstyles and hands. The dedicated EAA body features over 20 points of articulation and it includes a special, branded base with logo.
nodes.name: Ronin Logan

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present the Intercessors Brother Marine 02 Action Figure, as part of the Imperial Fists series from the line of Warhammer 40K action figures!  The Imperial Fists are among the First Founding Chapters of the Space Marines and stand out among other Space Marines as they have no fixed homeworld. Instead, they rely upon their ancient mobile space fortress named Phalanx which serves as both fortress and monastery.  Intercessors are the standard heavy infantry unit of the Primaris Space Marines, they are both the most numerous and most strategically versatile warriors in a battle squad. A Brother, or Battle-Brother, is the most common unit for a Space Marine to be assigned to after passing their trials, as well as being a general form of address Space Marines will use when addressing one another.
nodes.name: Intercessors Brother Marine 02

nodes.description: Here we go. The Flathead, model MT0D12. - Dum Dum  Sideshow, Dark Horse Direct, and CD Projekt Red are proud to present the Cyberpunk 2077: Militech Spiderbot Flathead Statue!  Based on the state-of-the-art Militech model MT0D12 Flathead , this premier replica statue is at the ready for stealth and recon. It has working light-emitting diodes (LEDs), including both green environment and red activation indicator lights. Poised over Maelstrom-tagged concrete from the streets of Night City, the Spiderbot Flathead stands to attention at 10.76 wide by 10 tall.  This piece looks as if it could come to life right off your shelf and is primed for its next mission. Don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection!
nodes.name: Militech Spiderbot "Flathead"

nodes.description: So, I lied. I cheated. I bribed men to cover up the crimes of other men. I am an accessory to murder. But most damning of all? I think I can live with it. And if I had to do it all over again, I would.   EXO-6 is happy to bring fans another museum-quality 1/6 figure of the beloved Captains of Star Trek - Captain Benjamin Sisko, commanding officer of Deep Space Nine. Portrayed by the talented Avery Brooks, Captain Benjamin Sisko is one of the most complex characters to come out of Star Trek. He is the first war-time Captain to lead a series and is more morally ambiguous than the other captains.  This 1:6-scale figure presents Captain Sisko from Season 6 in exquisite detail. Standing approximately 12 inches tall this is an all-new body designed by EXO-6. He wears the later movie uniform, each element of the outfit authentically reproduced. The original portrait sculpt of Brooks has an authentic, hand-painted likeness.  The Standard version of the Captain Benjamin Sisko Sixth Scale includes the figure with a highly-detailed recreation of his original costumes well as multiple optional pieces for recreating his outfit and appearance from the episode 'In the Pale Moonlight.'
nodes.name: Captain Benjamin Sisko (Standard Version)

nodes.description: Dark Horse Direct is proud to present an exclusive Masters of The Universe limited edition 11 inch by 17 inch print of the variant comic cover by Bill Sienkiewicz from the Masters of the Universe: Revelation comic series written by Kevin Smith, Rob David, and Tim Sheridan (the official prequel to the Netflix show)!  Feel the power emanating from this beautiful piece that begs to adorn your wall! Printed as an 11 x 17 lithograph on archival paper and hand-numbered. This will be limited to just 300 units, never to be reproduced, making it a true collector's piece.  By the power of Grayskull, your love of Eternia will be reignited with this one-of-a-kind, collectible, lithograph print.  The power is YOURS to pre-order now!
nodes.name: Masters of the Universe: Revelation Comic Series

nodes.description: Dark Horse Direct and CD Projekt Red team up to bring you the first-ever The Witcher variant comic bundle featuring the artistic talents of Anato Finnstark!  Limited to just 300 copies and includes an 11-inch by 17-inch fine art lithograph print (full-bleed, hand-numbered) of this eye-catching cover printed on silver foil paper!  Be sure to add to your collection today!  About the Comic:  Flames rise as a witch is burned at the stake. As Geralt searches for his next job, disturbing images of the fatal persecution appear before him, bringing an ominous warning.  Written by Bartosz Sztybor, with interior art by Vanessa del Rey, and colors by Jordie Bellaire!  This Exclusive Variant Cover by Anato Finnstark is one you don't want to miss out on!
nodes.name: The Witcher: Witch’s Lament #1 Variant

nodes.description: So, I lied. I cheated. I bribed men to cover up the crimes of other men. I am an accessory to murder. But most damning of all? I think I can live with it. And if I had to do it all over again, I would.   EXO-6 is happy to bring fans another museum-quality 1/6 figure of the beloved Captains of Star Trek - Captain Benjamin Sisko, commanding officer of Deep Space Nine. Portrayed by the talented Avery Brooks, Captain Benjamin Sisko is one of the most complex characters to come out of Star Trek. He is the first war-time Captain to lead a series and is more morally ambiguous than the other captains.  This 1:6-scale figure presents Captain Sisko from Season 6 in exquisite detail. Standing approximately 12 inches tall this is an all-new body designed by EXO-6. He wears the later movie uniform, each element of the outfit authentically reproduced. The original portrait sculpt of Brooks has an authentic, hand-painted likeness.  The Essentials version of the Captain Benjamin Sisko Sixth Scale includes the figure with a highly-detailed recreation of his original costume.
nodes.name: Captain Benjamin Sisko (Essentials Version)

nodes.description: Dark Horse Direct is proud to present their latest offering in fine art prints, Harvest Moon!  Featuring Yoshitaka Amano's masterfully artistic interpretation of the comic series The Umbrella Academy, originally created by Gerard Way (My Chemical Romance, True Lives of the Fabulous Killjoys) and Gabriel Bá (Two Brothers, Daytripper)!  Limited to just 500 available, don't miss the opportunity to add this unique 24-inch x 32-inch fine art print to your collection, filled with all of your favorite Umbrella Academy characters!  INSPIRATION FOR THE ART:  While searching for inspiration for this particular piece, Amano was on a veranda rooftop at his home in Japan one evening in September of 2019. There happened to be a beautiful Harvest Moon in the sky, perfectly full. It was in this moment, Amano imagined Spaceboy, and the rest of The Umbrella Academy, bursting out of the blinding moon falling upon their unsuspecting target.  ABOUT THE ARTIST:  Yoshitaka Amano was born in Shizuoka, Japan in 1952. An independent commercial illustrator since the 1980s, Amano became world famous through his designs for the first ten Final Fantasy games. Dark Horse has published over 40 books illustrated by Amano, including Hideyuki Kikuchi's Vampire Hunter D series, Final Fantasy Ultimania, Deva Zan, Shinjuku, and more!
nodes.name: Harvest Moon

nodes.description: Sideshow and Bandai are excited to present the PG RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 1:60 Model Kit!  Seen in the anime Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn, this 1:60 scale Perfect Grade model kit is fully transformable from regular to Destroy Mode and Destroy Mode Unchained once completed. This set includes pieces to build a custom display base to store weaponry.  Don't miss your chance to add this model kit to your collection!
nodes.name: PG RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 1:60

nodes.description: This delightful coin featuring the Shire form part of the LORD OF THE RINGS™ Coin Collection is available to order now!   The 1oz pure silver engraved coin shows close-ups of the iconic hobbit-holes. The silver has been antiqued to provide further definition to the landscape. The effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II on the opposite side confirms all of them as legal tender.   Each limited-edition coin arrives in themed packaging. Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm the coin's unique serial number and to guarantee the pureness of the silver.  These are treasured collectibles for any fan, a reminder of the extraordinary THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ trilogy. Make a promise to yourself to get one!
nodes.name: The Shire 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: This delightful coin featuring the Shire form part of the LORD OF THE RINGS™ Coin Collection is available to order now!   The 3oz pure silver engraved coin shows the full beauty of the Shire. The silver has been antiqued to provide further definition to the landscape. The effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II on the opposite side confirms all of them as legal tender.   Each limited-edition coin arrives in themed packaging. Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm the coin's unique serial number and to guarantee the pureness of the silver.  These are treasured collectibles for any fan, a reminder of the extraordinary THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ trilogy. Make a promise to yourself to get one!
nodes.name: The Shire 3oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Always causing trouble, the mischievous chipmunk brothers Chip and Dale horseplay with Donald Duck in this playful Disney collectible by Jim Shore. Blowing a raspberry, one of the chipmunks teases from a branch while the other rides the grumpy duck's head.
nodes.name: Donald with Chip and Dale

nodes.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney collectibles with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. With a love story as pure as gold, this pair of precious pups snuggle together sweetly. With intricate Jim Shore rosemaling and inspiring intimacy, this Lady and the Tramp piece steals hearts. This enchanting Disney collectible is a charming addition to any room.
nodes.name: Lady and the Tramp Love

nodes.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Snow White shines in this stunning Masterpiece by Jim Shore. With jewels and Swarovski crystals, this princess wears a stunning gown and sweet smile. She holds the famous apple in her delicate grip as the poison inside shines in metallic paint.  Add this Snow White figurine to your Disney collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Snow White Deluxe

nodes.description: The Disney Showcase Collection by Enesco combines the magic of Disney collectibles with beautifully sculpted resin art. Off to the second star on the right and straight on until morning, Peter sweeps Wendy Darling off her feet as they fly off to Neverland!  Be sure to add this Peter Pan figurine to your Disney collection today!
nodes.name: Peter Pan and Wendy Darling

nodes.description: Let us chat together a moment, my friend! There are still several hours until dawn, and I have the whole day to sleep.   Highly detailed 1/6 scale collectible statue of Count Orlok from the 1922 silent film Nosferatu: A Symphony of Horror. Standing atop a cobblestone base, Count Orlok awaits. Masterfully detailed from his sickly-looking fingers with overgrown nails to his gnarled and pointed ears and of course those fangs. The perfect gift for a classic horror film fan. Offered in two color variations, full color and a monochromatic black and white version.
nodes.name: Nosferatu (Black & White Version)

nodes.description: Let us chat together a moment, my friend! There are still several hours until dawn, and I have the whole day to sleep.   Highly detailed 1/6 scale collectible statue of Count Orlok from the 1922 silent film Nosferatu: A Symphony of Horror. Standing atop a cobblestone base, Count Orlok awaits. Masterfully detailed from his sickly-looking fingers with overgrown nails to his gnarled and pointed ears and of course those fangs. The perfect gift for a classic horror film fan. Offered in two color variations, full color and a monochromatic black and white version.
nodes.name: Nosferatu (Color Version)

nodes.description: In Blood Orders, 2 to 4 opponents will each take on the roles of powerful but disgraced vampires, exiled from a centuries-old order and hoping to build a new underground kingdom of their own in an unfamiliar city. Players will visit locations in disguise to gain resources, perform arcane rituals, and hypnotize the citizenry...but most importantly, they will turn hapless victims into fresh, bloodthirsty vampires under their command!  Building your new Order will involve managing a continuously evolving hand of vampire cards at your command, sending them throughout the city to visit Locations, perform arcane Rituals, bewitch Victims, and recruit new vampires, all over the course of 9 rounds (Days). All of these activities take the form of cards activated by your Order Tokens on the board, allowing you to amass critical resources, perform useful actions, and earn Victory Points. However, as your power grows, so does Fear within the city, making your quest increasingly difficult as the Days go by.  At the end of the 9th Day, the vampire player with the most Victory Points will reign supreme!
nodes.name: Blood Orders

nodes.description: Immaculate Confection is an original illustration by Jason Freeny, created in 2008. In 2021, the original design was reborn as a set of 5 sculptures, hand-sculpted by the artist himself. The artwork, which bears the meaning behind Jason's artist name Gummifetus, references a medical display model of the in utero fetal development of a baby gummi bear, from gumdrop to infant. The final stage of the transformation is now cast in clear polystone that mimics the color and transparency of a gummi bear.  After a successful first drop, Immaculate Confection: Gummi Fetus returns. During incubation, an electric shade of blue and a dose of raspberry goodness were added into the mix. It was a magical gestation and from it the vivid, sweet, and tart Immaculate Confection: Gummi Fetus (Blue Rasberry Edition) is born.
nodes.name: Immaculate Confection: Gummi Fetus (Blue Raspberry Edition)

nodes.description: You are an agent in the golden age of monster movies! The actors you represent specialize in particular monstrous roles and you must compete to get them the best ones possible. Tactics and poker-style bluffing will take you far – learn when to stand firm and go to a showdown or back down and accept a lesser role in a short feature. Is it better to employ your big stars now or hold them back to compete for more lucrative films? With a little luck skill and chutzpah, you may be cackling evilly over your victory in Creature Feature!
nodes.name: Creature Feature

nodes.description: Roll Dice to fight off a horde of Zombies and send them back to the graveyard where they belong… and maybe direct a few in your opponent's direction while you are at it! Zombie Mania is a push your luck dice game where players try to remove the zombies who have invaded their buildings with successful dice rolls. You may re-roll your dice if you saved a gravestone that tosses, but will you improve your results, or fail to remove any zombies at all by continuing to roll?  First player to remove all Zombies from their building wins!
nodes.name: Zombie Mania

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Venom #35 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Featuring variant cover art of the infamous and sinister Symbiote for Marvel Comics' Venom #35 issue, this dark vision of Venom was created by artist and illustrator InHyuk Lee, styled after comic book legend Todd McFarlane.  Limited to only 175, be sure to add this incredible Venom print Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: Venom #35 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: A girl's entitled to a little fun once in a while, isn't she?   Sideshow presents the Catwoman #1 Fine Art Print, an officially licensed DC Comics art print by Stanley 'Artgerm' Lau.   Stunning in her classic black leather suit, Catwoman smirks at the searchlight that has caught her in the act. Her bullwhip twists around her legs as she descends a Gotham City apartment building, striking a pose that's simply purrfect for landing on her feet. Behind Selina, the shadowy silhouette of a feline friend offers its silent support for Gotham's favorite cat burglar.  Originally created as a variant cover for Catwoman #1 written by Joëlle Jones, each Catwoman #1 Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity and an authorized, automated artist signature. This alluring illustration is available unframed and in a custom framed format in a limited edition of 400 pieces.  Don't let Selina Kyle slink away! Add the Catwoman #1 Fine Art Print by Stanley 'Artgerm' Lau to your DC Comics collection today.
nodes.name: Catwoman #1

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Miles Morales: Spider-Man #25 Fine Art Print!  Undoubtedly sophisticated tones bring our webbed hero to life in this cover art for Marvel Comics' Miles Morales: Spider-Man issue #25. Created by artist and illustrator InHyuk Lee, this print features Miles Morales as Spider-Man perched effortlessly atop ruins amidst a webbed backdrop, with the classic Spider-Man insignia ever-present.  Limited to only 175, be sure to add Miles Morales to your Spider-Man and Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: Miles Morales: Spider-Man #25

nodes.description: I been a lot of things in a lot of places — a sickly kid named James Howlett, a killing machine called Weapon X, a 'hero' goes by Wolverine…   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Wolverine: Weapon X Fine Art Print, a wild and untamed Marvel Comics art print by artist Richard Luong.  Deep in a hidden lab facility, a mutant is tested beyond his limits, turned into a living weapon against his will. This incredible illustration captures that horrifying rebirth, as Wolverine emerges from his Weapon X experimentation. He cuts through the wires and diodes that hold him captive, using his newfound Adamantium claws in a fit of righteous rage. His reddened eyes and savage snarl are all the warning the scientists need to know they've released a deadly beast — the Wolverine is ready to kill.  Each Wolverine: Weapon X Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this Wolverine artwork is a must-have addition to any fan's X-Men collection!  Unleash the animal within and bring home the Wolverine: Weapon X Fine Art Print by Richard Luong today.
nodes.name: Wolverine: Weapon X
